response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
Proven ability to deliver complex systems and optimize performance in distributed environments
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture design
Lacks background in AI accelerator optimization or deep-learning workload analysis
No evidence of GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or hardware-software co-design expertise
